query:
-- Count duplicates linked to S7275 (the phantom service)
SELECT COUNT(*) as duplicateCount, SUM(lineAmount) as totalDuplicateAmount
FROM billing_items
WHERE serviceExternalId = 'S7275' AND customerExternalId = 'C0161';

-- List all S7275-linked items to confirm they are duplicates
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE serviceExternalId = 'S7275'
ORDER BY lineAmount DESC;

-- Check S552C service details
SELECT s.externalId, s.planName, s.provider, s.monthlyCost, s.monthlyRevenue, c.name
FROM services s
JOIN customers c ON c.externalId = s.customerExternalId
WHERE s.externalId = 'S552C';

-- Check if there's ANY billing item for Middlemount Coal that mentions Exetel or 1300 or TFS500
SELECT id, description, lineAmount, serviceExternalId, invoiceNumber
FROM billing_items
WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0161'
AND (description LIKE '%Exetel%' OR description LIKE '%TFS500%' OR description LIKE '%1300%' OR description LIKE '%Corporate%' OR description LIKE '%0749850000%');
